subcodes.first_line: O Attar, scatter thou a musk-laden fragrance upon the world; diffuse the soul-reviving scent of the sweet breaths of love from the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار نفحه مشکباری بر عالم نثار کن بوی جانپرور نفحات محبت جمال قدم عبیر و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @poems and quotation from poetry, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
